title: Chhoti shuruaat, bada farak
body: Health koi ek din ka kaam nahi hai — yeh roz ki chhoti aadaton se banta hai. Sirf 5 minute bhi kaafi hai shuru karne ke liye.
Aaj ka maqsad perfect hona nahi, bas shuru karna hai. Ek task chuno aur use poora karo.
Jab aap roz thoda karte ho, body yaad rakhti hai. Consistency hi asli dawa hai.
tryTonight: Aaj sirf ek task complete karein — koi bhi.
tryTonightHindi: आज सिर्फ़ एक काम पूरा करें।

title: Sciatica mein sona kaise
body: Galat tarah se sona raat bhar lower back par dabav daalta hai — subah dard isi wajah se badhta hai.
Karwat lekar soyein to ghutnon ke beech ek takiya rakhein; seedhe soyein to ghutnon ke neeche.
Bahut naram (saggy) gadda kamar ke liye theek nahi — thoda firm gadda behtar hai.
tryTonight: Aaj ghutnon ke beech ya neeche takiya rakh kar soyein.
tryTonightHindi: घुटनों के बीच/नीचे तकिया रखकर सोएँ।

title: Thyroid ki goli ka sahi time
body: Thyroid ki dawa khaali pet leni chahiye — khaane se kam se kam 1 ghanta pehle.
Dawa ke baad chai, doodh ya calcium turant na lein — yeh absorption kam kar dete hain.
Roz ek hi time par lena sabse zaroori hai. Phone par alarm laga lein.
tryTonight: Kal subah ke liye thyroid dawa ka alarm set karein.
tryTonightHindi: कल सुबह की दवा का अलार्म लगाएँ।

title: Chhupa hua namak
body: BP ke liye namak sabse bada dushman hai — par asli khatra packet wale khaane mein chhupa hota hai.
Namkeen, achaar, papad, bread aur sauces mein bahut namak hota hai, bina swaad ke bhi.
Khaana banate waqt namak thoda kam karein — jeebh 2 hafte mein adjust ho jaati hai.
tryTonight: Aaj ek packaged snack ka namak (sodium) label padhein.
tryTonightHindi: एक पैकेट का नमक लेबल पढ़ें।

title: Protein — dal se aage
body: Hum Indians carb (chawal, roti) zyada aur protein kam khaate hain. Umar ke saath protein muscle bachata hai.
Dal, paneer, ande, dahi, soya aur chana achhe protein source hain.
Har thali mein ek protein zaroor rakhein — sirf dal-chawal kaafi nahi.
tryTonight: Aaj raat ke khaane mein ek extra protein add karein (dahi/paneer/anda).

title: Khaane ke baad chaal
body: Khaane ke turant baad 10 minute chalna blood sugar aur BP dono ke liye kamaal karta hai.
Yeh tez daudna nahi — bas aaram se ghar ya gali mein tehelna hai.
Dinner ke baad ki walk neend bhi behtar karti hai.
tryTonight: Aaj dinner ke baad 10 minute chalein.
tryTonightHindi: रात के खाने के बाद 10 मिनट चलें।

title: Sciatica — dard taang tak kyun jaata hai
body: Sciatic nerve kamar se nikalkar kulhe aur taang tak jaati hai — is par dabav padne se dard taang tak pahunchta hai.
Isliye sciatica mein sirf kamar nahi, taang ya pichhle hisse mein bhi jhunjhuni ya dard ho sakta hai.
Halki nerve-glide aur stretch nerve ko 'free' karne mein madad karti hai — par dard tez ho to ruk jaayein.
tryTonight: Aaj baithkar halki nerve glide karein (app ka video dekhein).

title: Potassium — namak ka dushman
body: Potassium body se extra sodium nikalne mein madad karta hai, isse BP control hota hai.
Kela, nariyal paani, palak, rajma, aloo aur dahi mein achha potassium hota hai.
Agar kidney ki problem ho to doctor se poochh kar hi badhayein.

title: Achhi neend, achhi sehat
body: Kam neend BP badhati hai aur dard ko zyada mehsoos karaati hai.
Sone se 1 ghanta pehle phone screen band karein — neeli roshni neend kharab karti hai.
Roz ek hi time par sona aur uthna body ki ghadi theek rakhta hai.
tryTonight: Aaj sone se 30 min pehle phone door rakhein.
tryTonightHindi: सोने से पहले फ़ोन दूर रखें।

title: Zyada baithna aur sciatica
body: Ek hi jagah lambe samay baithna sciatic nerve par dabav badha deta hai.
Har 30-40 minute mein uthkar thoda chalein ya halka stretch karein.
Pichhli jeb mein mota wallet rakh kar na baithein — yeh kulhe ka balance bigaadta hai.
tryTonight: Ek reminder lagayein — har 40 min mein uthna.
tryTonightHindi: हर 40 मिनट में उठने का रिमाइंडर।

title: Barf ya sikaai — kamar ke liye
body: Naya, tez dard ya soojan ho to barf (ice) — 15 minute, kapde mein lapet kar.
Purana, akdan wala dard ho to garam sikaai (heat) muscles dheeli karti hai.
Dono kabhi seedhe skin par nahi — hamesha kapde ke beech rakhein.
tryTonight: Akdan ho to aaj kamar par 10 min garam sikaai karein.
tryTonightHindi: कमर पर 10 मिनट गरम सिकाई करें।

title: BP roz naapna kyun
body: Ek baar ka reading kuch nahi batata — pattern hi asli kahani kehta hai.
Roz ek hi time par, 5 min aaram ke baad, baithe hue naapein.
Apne readings doctor ko dikhayein — isse dawa sahi set hoti hai.
tryTonight: Aaj BP naap kar app mein log karein.

title: Paani peena na bhoolein
body: Umar ke saath pyaas ka ehsaas kam hota hai, isliye paani peena yaad rakhna padta hai.
Din bhar thoda-thoda paani BP aur energy dono ke liye achha hai.
Subah uthte hi ek glass paani body ko jagaa deta hai.
tryTonight: Bistar ke paas paani ka glass rakhein.

title: Do hafte poore — shabaash!
body: Aapne 2 hafte apni sehat ko time diya — yeh badi baat hai.
Ab tak ke trends dekhein: dard, BP ya walk mein kya badla?
Aage bhi yahi chhoti aadtein jaari rakhein. Saath chalte rahenge.
tryTonight: Apne 14-din ke trends dekhein aur khud ko shabaashi dein.
